calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Karen Ciccone, Esq. 424-465-1530 Cermark & Inglin for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is not contested/Discussed. Ms. Ciccone informs the Court there are amendments to the proposed order and proposed consent judgment. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Plaintiff to submit a proposed order and proposed consent judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Continued To May-16-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
